> MimoBox — Local Sandbox Runtime for AI Agents
> Run AI-generated code safely, locally, and instantly.
> No API keys. No Docker. No cloud.

## Documentation

- docs/getting-started.md — Installation and Quick Start guide
- docs/architecture.md — 8-crate workspace architecture overview
- docs/api.md — Full API reference (SDK, Config, Error types)
- docs/mcp-server.md — MCP Server tool reference and integration guide
- docs/python-sdk.md — Python SDK installation and API guide
- SPECIFICATION.md — Performance specifications and benchmarks

## Examples

- crates/mimobox-sdk/examples/ — 14 Rust SDK examples (basic, streaming, http_proxy, env_vars, file_ops, agent_demo, agent_streaming, basic_sandbox, timeout_and_memory, network_policy, sandbox_pool, fork_demo, filesystem_isolation, llm_agent)
- examples/python/ — 9 Python SDK examples (basic, streaming, http_request, file_ops, env_vars, error_handling, context_manager, config_options, snapshot_restore)
- examples/wasm-tools/ — Wasm tool example

## Source Code

- crates/mimobox-core/ — Sandbox trait, Config, Error types, HTTP ACL rules (HttpAclRule, HttpMethod, HttpAclPolicy)
- crates/mimobox-os/ — OS-level sandbox (Landlock, Seccomp, Namespaces), PTY sessions
- crates/mimobox-wasm/ — Wasm sandbox (Wasmtime, WASI Preview 2)
- crates/mimobox-vm/ — microVM sandbox (KVM, snapshot/restore, fork, HTTP proxy with ACL enforcement)
- crates/mimobox-sdk/ — Unified SDK with smart routing, PTY sessions, HTTP ACL config, sandbox registry (list/id/info/metrics)
- crates/mimobox-mcp/ — MCP Server (15 tools: create/destroy sandbox, execute, stream_execute, list_dir, read_file, write_file, make_dir, stat, remove_file, rename, pty, http_request, fork, snapshot)
- crates/mimobox-python/ — Python bindings (PyO3): Sandbox with execute/stream_execute (on_stdout/on_stderr callbacks), FileSystem, Process, PtySession, SnapshotOps, Network, HTTP ACL, error_message, SandboxInfo, SandboxMetrics
- crates/mimobox-cli/ — CLI entry point (run, code, shell, ls, cat, write, snapshot, restore, bench, doctor, mcp-init)
